heading: View IP Access List Entries
body:
Atlas CLI

To list IP access list entries for your project using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas accessLists list [options]

```

To return the details for the IP access list entry you specify using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas accessLists describe <entry> [options]

```

To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas accessLists list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-accessLists-list) and
[atlas accessLists describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-accessLists-describe).

Related Links

- [Install the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/install-atlas-cli)

- [Connect to the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/connect-atlas-cli)
